TEST.0.title: Codebusters 2026 Division B Regional Test # 6
TEST.0.customHeader:
Names of participants: (Please print neatly)

 
 
 
School Name:

Check your team:  ◻ Varsity     ◻ JV1     ◻ JV2     ◻ JV3

Warning: Do not open this packet until given permission to do so.

Note: There are useful notes after this page.

CIPHER.415.cipherString: A few Cobras in your home will soon clear it of Rats and Mice. Of course, you will still have the Cobras.
CIPHER.415.question: Will Cuppy offers an observation that has been encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.415.author: Will Cuppy

CIPHER.400.cipherString: Happiness comes from within, not from without.
CIPHER.400.question: Your school's intercom crackled to life with static… then spelled out this Fractionated Morse message by David DeNotaris. You are told that the quote has NESSCO in it corresponding to the encoded text F N O S Z R W L, meaning F = –●×; L = –×–; N = ●×●; O = ●●×; R = ●–●; S = ●●●; W = ×––; Z = ××–. What does it say?
CIPHER.400.author: David DeNotaris

CIPHER.407.cipherString: Education enables people and societies to be what they can be.
CIPHER.407.question: Your smart fridge started flashing this cryptic message at 3 a.m. It's by Bill Richardson encoded in a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of GLORY and polybius key of GOLDFISH. What does it say?
CIPHER.407.author: Bill Richardson

CIPHER.399.cipherString: Have the courage to take off your mask and be humbled.
CIPHER.399.question: Upon searching a room, the following were found on scraps of paper. You are told it's a quote by Ken Poirot encoded as a Fractionated Morse. You are told that the quote has OFFYO in it corresponding to the encoded text I N E R B D L J, meaning B = ●××; D = –●–; E = –●×; I = –––; J = ––×; L = –×–; N = ×●●; R = ●●–. What does it say?
CIPHER.399.author: Ken Poirot

CIPHER.401.question: Your lab partner discovered this pattern on the back of a graphing calculator. It's a Cryptarithm. What do the values 80014558 72457 92316 decode to?

CIPHER.403.cipherString: When I eventually met Mr. Right I had no idea that his first name was Always.
CIPHER.403.question: Your lab partner's retainer case clicked open to reveal this Porta-encrypted quote by Rita Rudner using a keyword of WARM. What does it say?
CIPHER.403.author: Rita Rudner

CIPHER.408.cipherString: You choose what you learn, just as you choose what you fail at.
CIPHER.408.question: This coded passage was discovered in the margin of a physics exam from years ago. It's a quote by Anthony T. Hincks, encrypted as a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of SIMPLY and polybius key of DUPLICATE. What does it say?
CIPHER.408.author: Anthony T. Hincks

CIPHER.414.cipherString: The shortness of life, so often lamented, may be the best thing about it.
CIPHER.414.question: A strange code appears in the footer of a document you print from the lab computer. It's a quote by Arthur Schopenhauer, encoded in a Checkerboard with a polybius key of DIRECTLY. What does it say?
CIPHER.414.author: Arthur Schopenhauer

CIPHER.411.question: You find an encoded message in the test tube rack, written on masking tape. It's a quote by Pittacus of Mytilene, written in an Affine with a=9 and b=17. What does it say?
CIPHER.411.author: Pittacus of Mytilene

CIPHER.404.cipherString: I must be willing to give up what I am in order to become what I will be.
CIPHER.404.question: Found on a microchip inside a disassembled robotics kit: this Porta Cipher by Albert Einstein using a keyword of SIXTH. What does it say?
CIPHER.404.author: Albert Einstein

CIPHER.405.cipherString: Success without honor is an unseasoned dish it will satisfy your hunger, but it won't taste good.
CIPHER.405.question: You find a coded sequence scratched into the surface of a lab stool. It turns out to be a quote by Joe Paterno, written in a Complete Columnar. The quote has ONOR somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.405.author: Joe Paterno

CIPHER.396.cipherString: It's amazing how stress keeps you trim.
CIPHER.396.question: You receive this cryptic message from the future through an online time capsule. It's a quote by Peter Andre, written in a Baconian. You are told that the cipher text DRUMS EVERY MONTH FUZZY decodes to be SAMA. What does it say?
CIPHER.396.author: Peter Andre

CIPHER.406.cipherString: Fear of danger is ten thousand times more terrifying than danger itself.
CIPHER.406.question: An explorer's journal mentions a “hidden truth” encoded below. It turns out to be a quote by Daniel Defoe, written in a Complete Columnar Cipher. The quote has ORETERR somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.406.author: Daniel Defoe

CIPHER.397.cipherString: It's not enough to do good. You have to be seen doing good.
CIPHER.397.question: You open a forgotten email draft saved in the school's computer system. It holds a quote by Rene Balcer encoded in a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.397.author: Rene Balcer

CIPHER.409.cipherString: Keep your best wishes, close to your heart and watch what happens
CIPHER.409.question: A mysterious balloon release at the science fair carried this Atbash banner by Tony DeLiso. What does it say?
CIPHER.409.author: Tony DeLiso

CIPHER.391.cipherString: Bunsen was no theorist, and purely speculative questions had little or no interest for him.
CIPHER.391.question: A riddle is discovered taped under a chemistry lab bench. It's a quote, encrypted as an Aristocrat. What does it say?

CIPHER.394.cipherString: There is nothing more beautiful than cheerfulness in an old face, and among country people it is always a sign of a well-regulated life.
CIPHER.394.question: You stumble across this encoded text on an old floppy disk labeled “Project Discovery.” It's a quote by Richter encoded as a Patristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher ends with LIFE. What does it say?
CIPHER.394.author: Richter

CIPHER.395.cipherString: El problema con ella es que carece de la capacidad de conversación, pero no de la capacidad de hablar.
CIPHER.395.question: A coded message is discovered inside a fortune cookie. It turns out to be a quote by George Bernard Shaw in Spanish, encoded using a Xenocrypt Cipher using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains ELLA. What does it say?
CIPHER.395.author: George Bernard Shaw
CIPHER.395.translation: The trouble with her is that she lacks the power of conversation but not the power of speech.

CIPHER.412.cipherString: Doubt can only be removed by action.
CIPHER.412.question: Your smart fridge started flashing this cryptic message at 3 a.m. It's by Johann Wolfgang von Goethe encoded in an Affine with a=5 and b=18. What does it say?
CIPHER.412.author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

CIPHER.392.cipherString: Neatness and cleanliness is not a function of how rich or poor you are but that of mentality and principle.
CIPHER.392.question: The message below was intercepted from an experimental satellite transmission. It contains a quote by Ikechukwu Izuakor, encoded as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.392.author: Ikechukwu Izuakor

CIPHER.402.question: Your graphing calculator won’t stop displaying this Cryptarithm puzzle. What do the values 151 096071635 287864 decode to?

CIPHER.393.cipherString: Long ago I discovered that there was more to life than cricket, and more to cricket than runs and wickets.
CIPHER.393.question: David Foot offers us some advice that has been encoded as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher starts with LONG. What does it say?
CIPHER.393.author: David Foot

CIPHER.410.cipherString: Science consists exactly of those forms of knowledge that can be verified and duplicated by anybody.
CIPHER.410.question: You receive an anonymous text message containing a coded passage. It's said to be a quote by Seth Lloyd, encrypted with a Caesar. What does it say?
CIPHER.410.author: Seth Lloyd

CIPHER.398.cipherString: He who cannot do as he would, must do as he can.
CIPHER.398.question: Your smartwatch notification contained an Italian Proverb in a Baconian cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.398.author: Italian Proverb

CIPHER.413.cipherString: Poetry is what is lost in translation. It is also what is lost in interpretation.
CIPHER.413.question: A coded message appears after you shine a UV light on a classroom poster. It turns out to be a quote by Robert Frost, encrypted using a Checkerboard with a polybius key of SOUVENIR. What does it say?
CIPHER.413.author: Robert Frost
